branch_efficiency.description: Ratio of active threads that follow the same execution path (1.0 = all threads converged)

bank_conflicts.description: Number of shared memory bank conflicts for this access (max serialized accesses minus 1)

global_mem_transactions.description: Number of 128-byte L1 cache-line transactions issued for a global memory access (0 = non-global)

global_coalescing.description: Global memory coalescing efficiency: ideal_transactions / actual_transactions (1.0 = fully coalesced, 0 = non-global)
